- LSCR:DESC | EN: The College of Winterhold is an independent organization, and thus was not affected by the dissolution of the Mages Guild at the beginning of the Fourth Era. | ZH: 冬堡学院是一个独立组织，因此没有受到第四纪元之初法师公会解散的影响。 | SID: 00BABE

translations.english: Once a source of pride for the people of Winterhold, the College is now shunned and feared.
translations.chinese: 冬堡学院曾经是冬堡人民的骄傲，如今却备受冷落与畏惧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FactionCollege02
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Once a source of pride for the people of Winterhold, the College is now shunned and feared. | ZH: 冬堡学院曾经是冬堡人民的骄傲，如今却备受冷落与畏惧。 | SID: 00AE8B

translations.english: Most of Winterhold was lost to the sea in the Great Collapse of 4E 122, but the College was left mysteriously unharmed.
translations.chinese: 冬堡城的大部分地区在4E122年的大坍陷中被大海吞没，但学院却谜一般地完好无损。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FactionCollege03
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Most of Winterhold was lost to the sea in the Great Collapse of 4E 122, but the College was left mysteriously unharmed. | ZH: 冬堡城的大部分地区在4E122年的大坍陷中被大海吞没，但学院却谜一般地完好无损。 | SID: 00D830

translations.english: While the mages of the College of Winterhold gladly share knowledge amongst themselves, they do not offer most services to the rest of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 虽然冬堡学院的法师们乐于彼此分享知识，但他们并不向天际的大多数人提供服务。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FactionCollege04
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: While the mages of the College of Winterhold gladly share knowledge amongst themselves, they do not offer most services to the rest of Skyrim. | ZH: 虽然冬堡学院的法师们乐于彼此分享知识，但他们并不向天际的大多数人提供服务。 | SID: 001C8D

translations.english: The Companions trace their legacy back to the original Five Hundred Companions of Ysgramor, who led the first humans to Skyrim and eventually settled all of Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 战友团的历史可以追溯到伊斯格拉默的五百战友，他们率领着第一批人类来到天际，使人类最终定居整个泰姆瑞尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FactionCompanions02
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: The Companions trace their legacy back to the original Five Hundred Companions of Ysgramor, who led the first humans to Skyrim and eventually settled all of Tamriel. | ZH: 战友团的历史可以追溯到伊斯格拉默的五百战友，他们率领着第一批人类来到天际，使人类最终定居整个泰姆瑞尔。 | SID: 001C97

translations.english: Among the Companions' most treasured artifacts are the fragments of Wuuthrad, the axe that Ysgramor himself wielded when leading the Five Hundred.
translations.chinese: 战友团中最宝贵的传奇物品就是巫斯拉德的碎片，伊斯格拉默曾经挥舞此斧领导了五百英豪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FactionCompanions03
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Among the Companions' most treasured artifacts are the fragments of Wuuthrad, the axe that Ysgramor himself wielded when leading the Five Hundred. | ZH: 战友团中最宝贵的传奇物品就是巫斯拉德的碎片，伊斯格拉默曾经挥舞此斧领导了五百英豪。 | SID: 00CB42

translations.english: Kodlak Whitemane is the Harbinger of the Companions. He does not give orders, but his word is highly respected both inside Jorrvaskr and through all the nine Holds.
translations.chinese: “白鬃”克拉科是战友团的先驱。虽然他不发号施令，但他的话在月瓦斯卡内部和九大领都受到极大尊重。

agentText:

EDID: FactionCompanions04

translations.english: The Circle is a small group of the most trusted and accomplished warriors from among the ranks of the Companions.
translations.chinese: 圆环是战友团中最受信任且熟练的战士们组成的小群体。

agentText:

translations.english: Nobody knows who built the Skyforge, where the Companions' weapons are made. Its discovery led to the building of Jorrvaskr and the Companions as we know them today.
translations.chinese: 锻造战友团武器的天空熔炉由何人建造已无从知晓。它的发现造就了我们今天所知的月瓦斯卡和战友团。

translations.english: The great statue of Irkngthand is the only known visual representation of a Snow Elf, before centuries of subterranean slavery twisted the race into the vile Falmer.

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

OLAF AND THE DRAGON by Adonato Leonetti

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

ne of the more colorful legends in Nord folklore is the tale of Olaf One-Eye and Numinex. Long ago in the First Age, a fearsome dragon named Numinex ravaged the whole of Skyrim. The dreadful drake wiped out entire villages, burned cities and killed countless Nords. It seemed that no powerin Tamriel could stop the monster. This was a troubled time in Skyrim's history, for a bitter war of succession raged between the holds. The Jarls might have been able to conquesr the beast if they had worked together, but trust was in desperately short supply. A skillful warrior named Olaf came forward and promised to defeat the beast. In some accounts, he is the Jarl of Whiterun. In other versions of the legend, Olaf promises the people of Whiterun that he will capture the monster if they will name him Jarl. At any rate, Olaf ventures forth with a handful of his most trusted warriors and seeks the beast out, eventually finding Numinex in his lair atop Mount Athor. Needless to say, it's an epic battle. First, Olaf comes at the dragon with his axe and his shield. Some variants of the legend say that Olaf and the beast battled with blade and claw for days, but were too evenly matched for either to gain an advantage. Most accounts hold that Olaf, perhaps frustrated that his weapons are completely ineffectual against the dragon, finally casts them aside. Giving voice to the rage that has been building within him, Olaf unleashes a terrible shout. Here again, the stories diverge. Many accounts hold that Olaf did not realize he possessed the power of Dragon-speech, while others suggest that he had long possessed this gift, but wished to test himself against the dragon in martial combat first. Virtually all variations of the legend, however, agree on what happened next. Using the awesome powers of the Dragon language, Numinex and Olaf engage in an epic shouting duel atop Mount Athor. So forceful are their words, they are said to shatter the stone and split the sky. Finally, Numinex collapses from a combination of injury and sheer exhaustion. Somehow - and this detail is conspicuously absent in virtually every account - Olaf manages to convey the dragon all the way back to the capital city of Whiterun. The people of Whiterun are suitably impressed with Olaf's hostage. They build a huge stone holding cell at the rear of the palace, which they rename "Dragonsreach". This enormous cell serves as Numinex's prison until his death. Olaf himself eventually becomes the High King of Skyrim, putting an end to the war of succession. Presumably, his great deed made him the only leader upon whom all the people could agree, and so the land once again has peace. As a visitor to Skyrim, I find this tale both fascinating and highly entertaining. It is one the most celebrated legends of the Nords, and one can easily understand why. It's a story of surpassing heroism, in which a resourceful and worthy Nord does battle with a truly terrifying adversary and emerges victorious by yelling him into submission. The only way in which this could have been even more of a Nordic tale would be if Olaf beat Numinex in a drinking contest. The legend is not without its doubters, however. The bard Svaknir, who lived during Olaf's reign, wrote and performed an alliterative verse that challenged Olaf's version of events. Enraged, the High King threw the rebellious bard in prison and destroyed all written copies of the verse. How I would love to lay hands on a copy of that verse! I admit, I am immensely curious to know what assertions Svaknir made about how Olaf really defeated Numinex. There are a few ancient bard texts that provide one possible answer. These tomes suggest that Numinex was particularly foul-tempered because he was extremely old. In these accounts, the dragon spends his final years terrorizing the country side before flying off to the top of Mount Athor to die in peace. When Olaf finds Numinex, the dragon is to weak to defend himself. Olaf and his men capture the beast without effort, but decide to take advantage of the situation by fabricating a heroic tale. It is worth noting that all of Olaf's warriors who were said to witness the shout duel went on to become wealthy leaders during Olaf's reign as High King. However, it is equally likely that Svaknir had some grudge against Olaf, and his scandalous verse was an attempt to damage the High King's reputation. Alas, we will never know. I leave you now, good reader, with this gentle reminder: A good historian must remain impartial, and consider all points of view. Time has a way of distorting our record of events, so the closer you can get to the original sources, the better!
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

奥拉夫与龙 阿多纳托·莱奥特利 著

[pagebreak]

诺德民间奇谈中最为绚丽多彩的传说之一，便是“独眼”奥拉夫与怒米奈科斯的故事。 许久以前的第一纪元，一头名唤“怒米奈科斯”的可怖巨龙蹂躏着全天际。这骇人的巨龙夷平村庄，焚毁城市，所杀诺德人不计其数。似乎泰姆瑞尔没有任何力量可以阻止这头巨兽。 当时也是天际历史上最动荡的一段时期，诸领间爆发了激烈的继承人战争。领主们如果齐心协力，或能征服巨兽，然而他们之间极度缺乏互信。 一位叫“奥拉夫”的善战勇士挺身而出，承诺要打败巨兽。在某些传说中，他是白漫领的领主。但也有版本称，奥拉夫向白漫人民许诺，倘若他们尊奉自己为领主，他就会去擒获巨兽。 不论如何，奥拉夫与他最信任的几个战士启程冒险去寻找巨兽，最终于安索尔山山顶的龙巢内寻得怒米奈科斯。这无疑是一场史诗激斗。 交战之初，奥拉夫手持斧、盾攻向巨龙。该传奇的一些变体说奥拉夫与龙各凭武器和利爪厮杀数日，然双方势均力敌，难分胜败。 大多数描述中，奥拉夫可能因武器对巨龙完全无效而感到懊丧，最终将它们弃置一旁。奥拉夫因心中积愤，吼出一声可怕的喊叫。 自此处起，各版故事又出现了分歧。许多说法称奥拉夫并未意识到自己拥有龙吼的力量，而另一些则称他早已具备天赋，只是想现在战斗中考验考验自己。 然而，几乎所有版本对后续之事达成了一致。 怒米奈科斯与奥拉夫各自运用龙语的强大力量，在安索尔山巅展开了一场如史诗般的龙吼决斗。他们的言辞强横有力如斯，据称能裂石开天。 最终，备遭创伤、精疲力竭的怒米奈科斯轰然倒下。不知怎的，奥拉夫设法将龙带回了白漫城，而这一细节在各种版本中都明显缺失了。 白漫人民对奥拉夫的战俘印象颇为深刻。他们于宫殿后侧建起巨大的石制牢狱，将之更名为“龙临”。这个巨大牢狱一直作为怒米奈科斯的囚室，直至其死去。 奥拉夫本人最终成为了天际至高王，终结了继承人战争。据推测，是他伟大的事迹使他成为所有人都认可的不二领袖，天际由此获得和平。 作为造访天际的来客，我发现这故事既引人入胜又妙趣横生。这是诺德人最著名的传奇之一，而且原因很简单。这是一篇远越英雄主义的故事，机智勇敢而值得敬仰的诺德人与真正可怖的敌手战斗，并通过龙吼使之屈服从而取胜。倘若要这故事更具诺德风情，那就得把奥拉夫和怒米奈科斯在酒赛上比比了。 然而，也有人对传说持怀疑态度。生活于奥拉夫统治时期的吟游诗人斯瓦科尼尔，创作并演出了一篇头韵诗，挑战奥拉夫对事件的说法。愤怒的至高王将悖逆的吟游诗人投入牢狱，并销毁了该诗的所有抄本。 我是多么想取得那篇诗歌的抄本啊！我承认，我极度渴望知晓斯瓦科尼尔于奥拉夫如何真正击破怒米奈科斯一事编排了什么断言。 有数段古代吟游诗人所留文本提供了一种可能的答案。这些典籍认为怒米奈科斯因年老而异常暴躁。于这些记载中，巨龙在他寿命最后的几年中一直在恫吓乡村，而后飞到安索尔山山顶，平静地等死。 当奥拉夫寻获怒米奈科斯的时候，巨龙已然无力保护自己。奥拉夫和他的属下不费吹灰之力便擒得这头巨兽，但他们决意借此机会杜撰一段英雄故事。值得指出的是，奥拉夫手下所有据称见证了龙吼决斗的战士，后来无不在他任至高王时成为富裕的首脑人物。 然而也可能是斯瓦科尼尔对奥拉夫心怀怨憎，而他的谤诗乃一次败坏至高王声誉的尝试。可惜，我们永无知晓了。 亲爱的读者，我现在得提醒你们：一位优秀的史学家必须不偏不倚，把所有观点纳入考虑范围内。时间会扭曲我们对事件的记录，因此能得到越原始的文献越好！

translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> “老者”斯卡德领主： 安佳木材厂将按照您的要求供应所有木材。希望这能够消除我父亲留下的税收负债。 不过，我拒绝派我的工人去响应您招募风暴斗篷新兵的号召。要么木材，要么士兵。我们不可能两者兼顾。 安佳木材厂主人 艾里 </font>

- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Jarl Skald the Elder, Anga's Mill will be supplying all the lumber as per your instructions. Aeri, Owner of Anga's Mill </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> “老者”斯卡德领主： 安佳木材厂将按照您的要求供应所有木材。希望这能够消除我父亲留下的税收负债。 不过，我拒绝派我的工人去响应您招募风暴斗篷新兵的号召。要么木材，要么士兵。我们不可能两者兼顾。 安佳木材厂主人 艾里 </font> | SID: 003F68

translations.english: [pagebreak] 17 Second Seed It has been a long time since I've written an entry in this journal. I admit with some embarrassment then that when I pulled it down from the shelf, I nearly choked on the dust that flew. There is little to tell, but did suffer another awful nightmare of the war. I suppose this is an affliction common to many who must see the horrors of war firsthand. Writing about it has already helped me to feel better. 19 Second Seed Received a letter from Andurs in Whiterun. He has invited me to visit, and I intend to accept. It's been a long time since I was in the city. My only fear is the Thalmor. I have heard that they and their agents are abroad in Skyrim, rooting out worshippers of Talos. I must be sure to keep a low profile. 28 Second Seed Returned from my trip to Whiterun to find very few flowers have bloomed here. The rest of Skyrim is covered in blooms of fiery red and piercing blue, but only a scant few have appeared in or near the town. I'll make it my mission to change that. We could use some flowers to brighten this gloomy place. Perhaps I can get Tekla to help me. 9 Midyear Spent most of the day consoling Lod, who received news of his cousin Grimsvotr's death. They were quite close as youths, and Lod drank and talked of his childhood memories. It was touching, but bittersweet. 22 Midyear A wandering peddler passed through Falkreath today. I purchased a few sticks of incense from him. He was a nice young Nord lad, following in his father's footsteps. I think his name was Valbjorn. A few days later, one of the town guards spied a pack of carrion birds circling near the road. He found young Valbjorn's corpse, victim of a bandit attack. My heart is heavy, and yet I should know better. Life and death, growth and change, the turning of the seasons - these are all aspects of mighty Arkay. I should not be so affected by the death of one young man. And yet... 12 Sun's Height Travelers pass through town, speaking of the land in the grip of high summer. These are the warmest days of the year in Skyrim, but not in Falkreath. Here, all is mist and fog and rain. It is always cool and damp, and the seasons have little meaning. Solaf asked me about this today. He said that in a place of the dead such as our great cemetery, Arkay's dominion should be absolute. And yet, Arkay is also the Lord of Seasons and this place seems untouched by them. I gave the best answer I could. I explained that Falkreath is indeed a place of great power for Arkay, but he prefers to keep it this way, solemn and gray. Hopefully that was at least partly true, but who can possibly know the mind of a god? 20 Sun's Height Dreams of the war again, but this time something different. I was leading a small band of Aldmeri battlemages on a mission deep into the heart of Imperial territory. We had drawn near our target, a supply depot outside of Cheydinhal, when the sky suddenly darkened. A great shadow passed over us, and there was a roar so terrible it chilled my blood. Something was flying just overhead, so huge and so dark as to blot out the sun. The dream changed, then. I was here in Falkreath, performing a service for someone who had just passed away, though I do not recall who. From the corner of my eye, I saw a stranger approaching. I turned to look, but the shadow came again, and the roar, and then I awoke. Now that I reflect on the dream, I cannot help but wonder, was it a dragon? Why would I dream of such a creature, when I have never seen one? It seemed so real at the time, but now the memory is fading. What it means, I cannot say. Probably nothing.
translations.chinese: [pagebreak] 次种月17日 我已经很久没有在这本日记上写东西了。不得不尴尬地承认，当我把它从架子上拿下来时，灰尘差点把我呛死。 没有什么特别要说的，但我确实又做了关于战争的可怕噩梦。我想，对于那些亲眼目睹战争恐怖的人来说，这是感同身受的痛苦。写出来让我感觉好多了。 次种月19日 收到白漫城安度尔斯的信件。他邀请我去参观，我打算去一趟。我已经很久没进城看看了。 唯一让我害怕的就是梭默。我听说他们的特使正在天际铲除塔洛斯信徒。我必须保持低调。 次种月28日 从白漫之旅归来，我发现这里几乎没有开过花。天际其他地方覆盖着红的蓝的花朵，但很少出现在我们镇子或镇子周围。 我的任务就是改变着一切。我们可以用花朵来照亮这个阴暗的地方。也许可以找苔卡拉帮忙。 年中月9日 今天大部分时间都是在安慰罗德，他收到了表亲格里姆沃斯特的死讯。他们年轻的时候很要好，罗德边喝酒边谈他的童年往事。很感人，却也苦乐参半。 年中月22日 有个游商经过佛克瑞斯。我向他买了点香。他是个不错的诺德小伙，继承了自己父亲的事业。记得他好像叫瓦尔比约恩。 几天后，卫兵在发现一群食腐鸟在路边盘旋。瓦尔比约恩的尸体被发现了，他成了强盗袭击的牺牲品。 我的心情很沉重。但我应该更清楚。生老病死，季节轮转，这些都是伟大的阿尔凯的象征。我不该为一个年轻人的死而如此难过。可是…… 日高月12日 旅行者们穿过小镇，谈论着盛夏。这是天际一年中最热的日子，但不是佛克瑞斯的。这里，只有烟雾阴雨。天气一直很凉爽潮湿，季节没有什么意义。 索拉夫今天问了我一个问题。他说，在有死者的地方，比如我们的公墓，阿尔凯的统治应该是绝对的。然而阿尔凯也是季节之主，可这地方似乎没有被季节造访过。 我给出了我能给出的最好答案。我说，佛克瑞斯确实是阿尔凯拥有巨大力量的地方，但他更喜欢保持这种庄严而灰暗的方式。希望至少对了一部分，可谁又能懂神的想法呢？ 日高月20日 再次梦到了战争，但这次不同。 我正带领一小队先祖神洲战斗法师执行一项深入帝国领土中心的任务。我们的目标是夏丁赫尔城外的一个补给站，就在这时，天空突然变暗。 一个巨大的阴影掠过我们头顶，接着传来一声可怕的咆哮，吓得我血都凉了。有什么东西飞过头顶，又黑又大，遮天蔽日。 此时，梦境改变了。我正在佛克瑞斯为刚刚去世的人提供祷告，但我记不清那是谁了。我用眼角的余光瞥到一个陌生人走来。我转过身看，但那影子又来了，还有那吼声，然后我就醒了。 现在回想这个梦，我不禁想，那是龙吗？我从没见过这样的生物，为什么要梦到它呢？当时看起来很真实，可现在记忆正在褪色。 我说不出这意味着什么。也许什么都不是。

Something was flying just overhead, so huge and so dark as to blot out the sun. The dream changed, then. I was here in Falkreath, performing a service for someone who had just passed away, though I do not recall who. From the corner of my eye, I saw a stranger approaching. I turned to look, but the shadow came again, and the roar, and then I awoke. Now that I reflect on the dream, I cannot help but wonder, was it a dragon? Why would I dream of such a creature, when I have never seen one? It seemed so real at the time, but now the memory is fading. What it means, I cannot say. Probably nothing. | ZH: [pagebreak] 次种月17日 我已经很久没有在这本日记上写东西了。不得不尴尬地承认，当我把它从架子上拿下来时，灰尘差点把我呛死。 没有什么特别要说的，但我确实又做了关于战争的可怕噩梦。我想，对于那些亲眼目睹战争恐怖的人来说，这是感同身受的痛苦。写出来让我感觉好多了。 次种月19日 收到白漫城安度尔斯的信件。他邀请我去参观，我打算去一趟。我已经很久没进城看看了。 唯一让我害怕的就是梭默。我听说他们的特使正在天际铲除塔洛斯信徒。我必须保持低调。 次种月28日 从白漫之旅归来，我发现这里几乎没有开过花。天际其他地方覆盖着红的蓝的花朵，但很少出现在我们镇子或镇子周围。 我的任务就是改变着一切。我们可以用花朵来照亮这个阴暗的地方。也许可以找苔卡拉帮忙。 年中月9日 今天大部分时间都是在安慰罗德，他收到了表亲格里姆沃斯特的死讯。他们年轻的时候很要好，罗德边喝酒边谈他的童年往事。很感人，却也苦乐参半。 年中月22日 有个游商经过佛克瑞斯。我向他买了点香。他是个不错的诺德小伙，继承了自己父亲的事业。记得他好像叫瓦尔比约恩。 几天后，卫兵在发现一群食腐鸟在路边盘旋。瓦尔比约恩的尸体被发现了，他成了强盗袭击的牺牲品。 我的心情很沉重。但我应该更清楚。生老病死，季节轮转，这些都是伟大的阿尔凯的象征。我不该为一个年轻人的死而如此难过。可是…… 日高月12日 旅行者们穿过小镇，谈论着盛夏。这是天际一年中最热的日子，但不是佛克瑞斯的。这里，只有烟雾阴雨。天气一直很凉爽潮湿，季节没有什么意义。 索拉夫今天问了我一个问题。他说，在有死者的地方，比如我们的公墓，阿尔凯的统治应该是绝对的。然而阿尔凯也是季节之主，可这地方似乎没有被季节造访过。 我给出了我能给出的最好答案。我说，佛克瑞斯确实是阿尔凯拥有巨大力量的地方，但他更喜欢保持这种庄严而灰暗的方式。希望至少对了一部分，可谁又能懂神的想法呢？ 日高月20日 再次梦到了战争，但这次不同。 我正带领一小队先祖神洲战斗法师执行一项深入帝国领土中心的任务。我们的目标是夏丁赫尔城外的一个补给站，就在这时，天空突然变暗。 一个巨大的阴影掠过我们头顶，接着传来一声可怕的咆哮，吓得我血都凉了。有什么东西飞过头顶，又黑又大，遮天蔽日。 此时，梦境改变了。我正在佛克瑞斯为刚刚去世的人提供祷告，但我记不清那是谁了。我用眼角的余光瞥到一个陌生人走来。我转过身看，但那影子又来了，还有那吼声，然后我就醒了。 现在回想这个梦，我不禁想，那是龙吗？我从没见过这样的生物，为什么要梦到它呢？当时看起来很真实，可现在记忆正在褪色。 我说不出这意味着什么。也许什么都不是。 | SID: 0108FD - BOOK:FULL | EN: Runil's Journal | ZH: 鲁尼尔的日记 | SID: 010120

translations.english: Has anyone ever explored the barrow?
translations.chinese: 有什么人探索过那座古坟吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FFI01WilhelmIvestigateBranchTopic
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: Has anyone ever explored the barrow? | ZH: 有什么人探索过那座古坟吗？ | SID: 00A3F0

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

Journal of Wyndelius Gatharian

[pagebreak] [pagebreak] 4E 200, 18 Morning Star I've set up camp inside the barrow. This has to be the place. According to all of my research, the burial chamber should be located here. All I need is some time undisturbed to find the claw. It must be hidden here somewhere. 4E 200, 25 Morning Star Had a close call today with that fool Wilhelm. He came close to entering the barrow, but I was able to scare him off by rattling some pottery shards in a bag. These people are far too superstitious for their own good. Gives me an idea. 4E 200, 28 Morning Star After a few failures, I've come up with a mixture that should do the trick. The glow is perfect - I should look exactly like one of the supposed spirits the people of Ivarstead believe is haunting this barrow. Going to test it out tomorrow. 4E 200, 29 Morning Star Success! It worked better than I could have imagined. All I had to do was wander about the entrance to the barrow at night and wave my arms about. I had to stop myself from laughing aloud as they ran away. This should keep them at bay while I continue searching for the claw. 4E 200, 11 Hearthfire Almost half a year has passed and no sign of the claw or any clues as to its whereabouts. This is becoming maddening. It has to be here! Can't risk hiring any assistance, so I'll have to continue alone. 4E 200, 20 Sun's Dusk It isn't here. It can't be here. This isn't right. It must be the people of Ivarstead... they must be on to my ruse, and they're toying with me. They want to find the burial chamber on their own and keep the riches for themselves! 4E 200, 18 Evening Star Why? Why are they tormenting me? Why not just destroy me? I'm... who am I? My head is becoming clouded, I can't remember anything. I have to read my journal to remember my purpose. Am I a part of this tomb? Am I meant to guard it? What's becoming of me? 1E 1050 ...They shall not take my treasure. They shall all pay dearly for their crimes. Any who set foot within these walls will taste my wrath, my power. I am the guardian of Shroud Hearth Barrow! All who oppose me will fall...
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

韦德留斯·加瑟林的日记

[pagebreak] [pagebreak] 4E200年，晨星月18日 我在古坟安营了。一定在这里。根据我所有的研究，墓室应该就在这里。我只需要一段不受干扰的时间来找到龙爪。它一定藏在某个地方。 4E200年，晨星月25日 今天差点和那个笨蛋威尔海姆撞上。他快要进古坟了，但我用碎陶片的声音把他吓走了。这些人太迷信。我有主意了。 4E200年，晨星月28日 经过几次失败之后，我想出一种药剂应该能达到目的。这种微光能让我完美地伪装成所谓的精魂，伊瓦尔镇的人都相信古坟里有鬼。明天可以去测试一下。 4E200年，晨星月29日 成功了！效果比我想得还好。我要做的就是每晚在古坟入口处徘徊，然后挥挥手。他们跑开的时候，我一直在憋笑。在我继续寻找龙爪的过程里，他们应该会对我敬而远之了。 4E200年，炉火月11日 差不多半年过去了，龙爪没有任何迹象，也找不到关于下落的线索。令人火大。它一定在这里！不能冒险雇人帮忙，只能一个人继续了。 4E200年，日暮月20日 不在这里，不可能在这里。出问题了。肯定是伊瓦尔镇的人搞鬼……一定是他们识破了我的诡计，他们在耍我。他们想自己找到墓室，独占财宝！ 4E200年，夜星月18日 为什么？他们为什么要折磨我？为什么不直接毁了我？我……我是谁来着？脑子变模糊了，什么都不记得了。我必须读日记来记住目的。我是这坟墓的一部分？我应该保护它吗？我这是怎么了？ 1E1050年 ……他们不能拿走我的财宝。他们要为罪行付出沉重代价。任何企图踏入这里的人都要尝到我的怒火，我的力量。我就是覆炉古坟的守护者！所有与我为敌的人都会倒下……

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> Brandyl, I hope this text of your father's last words finds its way to your hands. I served House Telvanni as a wet nurse during your first months of life and wanted to repay your father's kindness. I've done all I can to locate you, but I regret that we'll never meet face-to-face. Hidrya Olen </font> <font face="$SkyrimBooks"> 4E 6 Second Seed, Middas Is this the end of all things? Are we to die by the cruel barbed blades of the Argonian invasion force? After surviving the Red Year, struggling to dig from the ash and the rubble, and burying the thousands that died, is this to be our epitaph? The irony of our demise glows brighter than Masser on the summer solstice. We brought this upon ourselves; the Argonians simply answering a rallying cry incited by a millennia of suffrage imposed by my kind. And so here I sit, in the crumbling basement of our family home while a thousand thousand booted feet echo above me and the screams of the dying find their way to my ears. So falls House Telvanni. But then I look into the eyes of this child, this blessing given to us the very year that Vvardenfell spouted its fiery death across the land; this gift I hold my grasp. Is it too much to wish he be given the chance to survive and keep our memories alive? This small boy born in the midst of chaos and destruction must carry on. If nothing else, as a reminder to other dunmer that the Telvanni were once a proud and noble people. Since the death of my wife, I haven't been able to bring myself to give my son a proper name. It never felt right without her. But my own life reaches its final hours as the luxury of time is escapes my embrace. I name him now: Brandyl, son of Lymdrenn and sole living heir to House Telvanni. I will wrap him in his t'lonya, his birthing swaddle and leave his fate to Azura's will. Live with virtue and pride, sera. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 布兰戴尔： 希望你父亲临终前的文本能够送到你的手上。我曾在你出生后的几个月内在泰瓦尼家族担任奶妈，报答你父亲的恩情。我已经尽我所能找寻到了你的下落。只可惜你我不能相见了。 海德瑞亚·奥伦 </font> <font face="$SkyrimBooks"> 4E6年次种月，周三 万事休矣？我们要命丧阿尔贡侵略者的尖刺利刃之下？侥幸活过红色之年，挣扎着从灰烬和瓦砾中挖掘又重新埋葬了成千上万死者，而这就是我们的墓志铭？我们灭亡的讽刺比夏至的马瑟尔还要光亮。一切都是我们自作自受，阿尔贡不过是回应了我们千年来的压迫。所以我就坐在家中摇摇欲坠的地下室里，听着成千上万只靴子在我头顶踢踏作响，还有垂死者的惨嚎。泰瓦尼家族也要完了。 但当我看着这孩子的眼睛，我知道，他就是瓦登费尔爆发死亡之火的那一年赐予我们的礼物;我正紧握着这份馈赠。希望他能有机会活下来，让我们的记忆永存，这一切是否太过奢求？这个出生在混乱和破坏之中的小男孩必须坚持下去。不出意外的话，这能够提醒其他丹莫，泰瓦尼家也曾经骄傲而高贵。 自从我妻子死后，我一直没给孩子起个合适的名字。没有她，一切都是那么难以适应。但我自己的生命也到了最后几个小时，不能让奢侈的时间从我的怀抱中溜走了。我现在给他起名:布兰戴尔，莱姆德伦之子，泰瓦尼家族唯一在世的继承人。我会把他裹在襁褓里，把他的命运交给阿祖拉。 要带着美德和骄傲生活下去，瑟拉。 </font>
莱姆德伦·泰瓦尼的日记

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FFRiften08BrandSheiBook

- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> Brandyl, I hope this text of your father's last words finds its way to your hands. I served House Telvanni as a wet nurse during your first months of life and wanted to repay your father's kindness. I've done all I can to locate you, but I regret that we'll never meet face-to-face. After surviving the Red Year, struggling to dig from the ash and the rubble, and burying the thousands that died, is this to be our epitaph? The irony of our demise glows brighter than Masser on the summer solstice. We brought this upon ourselves; the Argonians simply answering a rallying cry incited by a millennia of suffrage imposed by my kind. And so here I sit, in the crumbling basement of our family home while a thousand thousand booted feet echo above me and the screams of the dying find their way to my ears. So falls House Telvanni. translations.english: Rejoice, Reader... For Mara's Light Shines Upon YOU! Mara's Benevolence is everlasting and Her Warmth widespread throughout the world. Shut your eyes, lift your head to the heavens and bask in the glow that shapes our destiny! Lady Mara will embrace any regardless of their past. Cast away your misdeeds and freshen your spirit! Give unto Her all the compassion that you would give unto your birthmother and learn that She will never leave you, never cast you aside and never forsake you! Donations are being accepted at the Temple of Mara in Riften
translations.chinese: 读者，请开心些…… 因为玛拉之光照耀在你的身上！ 玛拉的仁慈是永恒的，她的温暖遍及世界。合上双眼，抬起头，沐浴在塑造我们命运的光芒之中！ 不论过往，玛拉女神都会拥抱每个人。摒弃你的恶行，振作起来！将你对母亲的一切关爱都赐予她，须知她从未离开你，从未抛弃你也从未放弃你！ 裂谷城玛拉神殿接受你的捐赠。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim EDID: FFRiftenWarmthofMara Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN:

Rejoice, Reader... For Mara's Light Shines Upon YOU! Mara's Benevolence is everlasting and Her Warmth widespread throughout the world. Shut your eyes, lift your head to the heavens and bask in the glow that shapes our destiny! Lady Mara will embrace any regardless of their past. Cast away your misdeeds and freshen your spirit! Give unto Her all the compassion that you would give unto your birthmother and learn that She will never leave you, never cast you aside and never forsake you! Donations are being accepted at the Temple of Mara in Riften | ZH:

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>My Dearest Camilla, I yearn to have you as my own, Washing my linens, And my fine blond hair, To cook my dinner from my stove, And tend to my house while I wander. Yours Truly, Sven</font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>亲爱的凯米拉： 我渴望拥有你， 洗我的床单， 洗我漂亮的金发， 用我的炉子给我做饭， 在我出去游荡的时候为我照看房子。 敬上， 斯万</font>
法恩达尔伪造的斯万来信

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FreeformRiverwood01LetterFaendal
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>My Dearest Camilla, I yearn to have you as my own, Washing my linens, And my fine blond hair, To cook my dinner from my stove, And tend to my house while I wander. Yours Truly, Sven</font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>亲爱的凯米拉： 我渴望拥有你， 洗我的床单， 洗我漂亮的金发， 用我的炉子给我做饭， 在我出去游荡的时候为我照看房子。 敬上， 斯万</font> | SID: 00A2A1
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Faendal's Fake Letter from Sven | ZH: 法恩达尔伪造的斯万来信 | SID: 001A84

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Dear Camilla, I know I have called upon you at your house many times, and while we may be growing close, I need you to put any desires you may have for me aside. I am a true-born son of Valenwood, and I could never befoul my bloodline by courting an Imperial. I hope we can remain true friends, provided you understand your people's place in the Aldmeri Dominion, and respect me as such. Sincerely, Faendal</font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>亲爱的凯米拉： 我已经去你家拜访过你很多次，虽然我们可能越来越亲密了，但我需要你把对我的任何欲望放一边。我是真正的威伦森林之子，绝不会因为追求帝国人而玷污我的血统。希望我们能成为真正的朋友，前提是你能理解你们一族在先祖神洲的地位，并尊重我。 此致，法恩达尔</font>
斯万伪造的法恩达尔来信

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FreeformRiverwood01LetterSven
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Dear Camilla, I know I have called upon you at your house many times, and while we may be growing close, I need you to put any desires you may have for me aside. I am a true-born son of Valenwood, and I could never befoul my bloodline by courting an Imperial. I hope we can remain true friends, provided you understand your people's place in the Aldmeri Dominion, and respect me as such. Sincerely, Faendal</font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>亲爱的凯米拉： 我已经去你家拜访过你很多次，虽然我们可能越来越亲密了，但我需要你把对我的任何欲望放一边。我是真正的威伦森林之子，绝不会因为追求帝国人而玷污我的血统。希望我们能成为真正的朋友，前提是你能理解你们一族在先祖神洲的地位，并尊重我。 此致，法恩达尔</font> | SID: 00319C

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Leonitus, You idiot. When were you thinking of visiting your family? When your mother was buried in the ground, or after some damned wizard roasts all my crops? You make plans to come back to the farm this season, or I'll put all your old things in a pile and use them as firewood. Your Father, Rogatus </Font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 莱昂提尤斯： 你这蠢货，到底打算什么时候回家？是等你妈下葬，还是哪个该死的巫师烧了我的庄稼？ 这季度必须回家，否则我就拿你所有旧东西当柴火烧了。 你爹 罗迦图斯 </Font>

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> My dearest Ranmir, By the time you receive this, I will be gone. I know that it's wrong to mislead you, but I didn't want you to prevent me from going. I know it's been hard on you, on both of us, struggling to survive. I hate to see the look in your eyes every time you think about how little the two of us have, and I know you're too proud to ever say anything. So I'm going to make it all better. I've talked to my friend Vex, and she's given me some advice. I know how to get something that will allow us to live happily, without ever worrying about money ever again. I love you so much, Ranmir. You mean the world to me, and I only want to see you happy. Worry not. I'll be home soon. Isabelle
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 我亲爱的兰米尔： 你收到这封信的时候，我已经离开了。我知道误导你不对，但我不想让你阻止我去。 我知道挣扎着活下去对你我来说都很艰难。我不喜欢你每次想到我们俩一无所有时你的眼神，我知道你很骄傲，不愿意多说。所以我会让一切都好起来的。 我和我朋友小烦谈过，她给了我一些建议。我知道怎么得到能让我们快乐的生活，不必担心钱的东西。 我很爱你，兰米尔。你就是我的一切，我只想看到你幸福。 别担心，我很快就会回家。 ——伊莎贝拉

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: FreeformWinterholdCLetter
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> My dearest Ranmir, By the time you receive this, I will be gone. I know that it's wrong to mislead you, but I didn't want you to prevent me from going. I know it's been hard on you, on both of us, struggling to survive. I hate to see the look in your eyes every time you think about how little the two of us have, and I know you're too proud to ever say anything. So I'm going to make it all better. I've talked to my friend Vex, and she's given me some advice. I know how to get something that will allow us to live happily, without ever worrying about money ever again. I love you so much, Ranmir. You mean the world to me, and I only want to see you happy. Worry not. I'll be home soon. Isabelle | ZH: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 我亲爱的兰米尔： 你收到这封信的时候，我已经离开了。我知道误导你不对，但我不想让你阻止我去。 我知道挣扎着活下去对你我来说都很艰难。我不喜欢你每次想到我们俩一无所有时你的眼神，我知道你很骄傲，不愿意多说。所以我会让一切都好起来的。 我和我朋友小烦谈过，她给了我一些建议。我知道怎么得到能让我们快乐的生活，不必担心钱的东西。 我很爱你，兰米尔。你就是我的一切，我只想看到你幸福。 别担心，我很快就会回家。 ——伊莎贝拉 | SID: 00066F

translations.english: Akatosh is the god of time and the chief deity of the Nine Divines. He is depicted as a dragon, and chose that form to battle Mehrunes Dagon in the Oblivion Crisis.
translations.chinese: 阿卡托什是时间之神，也是九圣灵中的首神。他被形容成巨龙模样，并在湮灭危机中以此形态与梅鲁涅斯·大衮交战。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: GodAkatosh
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Akatosh is the god of time and the chief deity of the Nine Divines. He is depicted as a dragon, and chose that form to battle Mehrunes Dagon in the Oblivion Crisis. | ZH: 阿卡托什是时间之神，也是九圣灵中的首神。他被形容成巨龙模样，并在湮灭危机中以此形态与梅鲁涅斯·大衮交战。 | SID: 0116B6

translations.english: Arkay is the god of burials and funeral rites. His priests root out undead and necromancy wherever it may be found. Every Skyrim city has a Hall of the Dead dedicated to him.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯是埋葬与葬礼之神。他的祭司们致力于铲除亡灵与死灵法术。天际每座城市都有一座供奉他的亡者之厅。

translations.english: Dibella is the goddess of beauty. She has a temple in Markarth that is devoted to women.
translations.chinese: 迪贝拉是美之女神。她在马卡斯有一座专向女性开放的神庙。

translations.english: Julianos is the god of wisdom and logic. Usually associated with magic, he is often revered by wizards. He has a shrine in the Temple of the Divines in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 尤里安诺斯是智慧与逻辑之神。通常与魔法联系起来，他常受到巫师们的崇敬。他在独孤城的圣灵神殿有一处祭坛。
